title: 01439_StyleGAN-T_Unlocking_the_Power_of_GANs_for_Fast_Large-Scale_Text-to-Image_Synthesis
positive_examples: StyleGAN-T significantly improves over previous GANs and outperforms distilled diffusion models in terms of sample quality and speed, enabling faster and more efficient text-to-image synthesis.
The model allows for smooth interpolations between prompts, enhancing creative applications in art and design.
negative_examples: StyleGAN-T can struggle to bind attributes to objects and produce coherent text in images, which may lead to misinterpretations or misleading representations.
High guidance strength during training can result in image artifacts, potentially affecting the quality and reliability of generated images.
